description_long: This is a charming pink bungalow surrounded by a wooden picket fence, featuring a brown gable roof and a well-maintained garden. The front yard includes a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, flanked by flower beds and shrubs. To one side, there is a white-framed greenhouse with visible plants inside, and several raised garden beds are arranged nearby. The property also includes two stylized trees and a small patio area with outdoor furniture. Windows are symmetrically placed on the front and side facades, and the house has a cozy, suburban feel. The overall scene is vibrant, with green grass, colorful flowers, and a neat, organized layout.
description: A pink bungalow with a brown gable roof, surrounded by a wooden fence, garden beds, a greenhouse, and stylized trees. The property features a paved walkway, flower beds, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the side of the bungalow with the greenhouse, garden beds, and a clear view of the fenced yard and patio area.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the bungalow, highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical windows, walkway, and two stylized trees.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear side of the bungalow, with the walkway leading to the greenhouse and a broader view of the fenced garden.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the side of the bungalow with a large window, the greenhouse, and the garden area, with the trees visible in the background.
